title: dianthus × corberae
intro: Dianthus × corberae, also known as the Corbera pink or fragrant pink, is a rare and fragrant species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dianthus × corberae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used in the form of infusions, teas, or salves, and can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
